title: The Emperors Face the Worst Generation
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Beast Pirates as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GOD DAMMIT... WHY DID A FORMER...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Have to come and help those damn upstairs?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... I understand their numbers advantage....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They may have been small fry, but they were still members of the beast pirates...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kiku... Kim' Emon... I hope my actions allowed the two of you to escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...yes, we're from the AEGIS O branch.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard you were on the island, Izo....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's just pretend we never saw each other.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We technically aren't meant to let you off the hook...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For being a member of a notorious crew,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we've currently got our eyes set on the straw hats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If that gunpow- Der goes off...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
